ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Nov-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Tsu, via Zoom, for Marissa Ferguson, Executor.

Counsel offers testimony regarding why he missed the last calling of this matter and that the Inventory and Appraisal was mailed to the court and is pending filing. The court notes that this is the second hearing he has missed. The court advises that it is imposing sanctions in the amount of $200 payable within ten (10) days of today, with a Notice of Payment of Sanctions within fifteen (15) days from today.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Status hearing is continued to Nov-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Continued To Oct-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Melissa Ferguson and Attorney Jeffrey C. Tsu to appear on Oct-18-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed. An Order to Show Cause why the court should not sanction the Personal Representative and her Attorney $250 each for failure to appear is set for the same date. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Tsu, via Zoom, for and with Marissa Ferguson, Petitioner.

Counsel offers testimony regarding why he missed the previous calling of this matter and the Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The court then discusses with Mr. Tsu and Ms. Francisco regarding the number of attorneys who had previously represented Ms. Francisco and ultimately withdrew. The court then confirms that both counsel and Petitioner understand that probate and trust assets cannot be commingled.
The court confirms that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Aug-30-2005 is admitted to probate. Marissa Ferguson is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on Filing Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for Sep-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for May-23-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Continued To Apr-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Petitioner Marissa Ferguson and Attorney Jeffry Tsu to appear on Apr-26-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.
